scripts.cf:preview: NUXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 node node_modules/nuxt/bin/nuxt.mjs generate && node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js dev
scripts.cf:deploy: NUXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 node node_modules/nuxt/bin/nuxt.mjs generate && node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js deploy
scripts.d1:migrate:local: node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js d1 migrations apply discussion --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js d1 migrations apply discussion --remote
